Package com.gpudb.protocol

Class GetJobResponse.JobStatus

java.lang.Object
com.gpudb.protocol.GetJobResponse.JobStatus
Enclosing class:
GetJobResponse
public static final class GetJobResponse.JobStatus extends Object
A set of string constants for the GetJobResponse parameter jobStatus.

Status of the submitted job.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    CANCELLED
    Job cancellation was requested while the execution was in progress.
    static final String
    DONE
    The job execution has successfully completed and the response is included in the jobResponse or jobResponseStr field.
    static final String
    ERROR
    The job was attempted, but an error was encountered.
    static final String
    RUNNING
    The job is currently executing.

  • Method Summary

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • RUNNING

      public static final String RUNNING
      The job is currently executing.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DONE

      public static final String DONE
      The job execution has successfully completed and the response is included in the jobResponse or jobResponseStr field.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ERROR

      public static final String ERROR
      The job was attempted, but an error was encountered. The statusMap contains the details of the error in error_message.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CANCELLED

      public static final String CANCELLED
      Job cancellation was requested while the execution was in progress.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
